title: Autotmating Tags to Clear After Status Change to "Done"
excerpt: Is there a way for tags to clear after the status of an item changes to “done”? I found tags to be extremely useful in labeling certain items for further questions. Tags allow me to see my questions across all boards. Ho…

posts.author: GonzalezConstruction (Edgar)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way for tags to clear after the status of an item changes to “done”? I found tags to be extremely useful in labeling certain items for further questions. Tags allow me to see my questions across all boards. However, I have to manually clear them once the item is done. Is there a way to automate this process or perhaps a better way to go about this?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @GonzalezConstruction

Welcome to the community! There is a little free app that can be installed through this link monday.com: Where Teams Get Work Done
After it is installed in your account there is an action in the custom automation builder called “Clear column”. See below.

image2440×909 69.3 KB

Happy tag clearing
